FileVersion.description: Major version of the metadata schema used.

Identifier.description: A stable GUID for this mod. Currently not used.

LastWrite.description: The UTC time when this file was written by Penumbra.

Description.description: Description of the mod. Can span multiple paragraphs.

Image.description: Relative path to a preview image for the mod. Unused by Penumbra, present for round-trip import/export of TexTools-generated mods.

Version.description: Version of the mod. Can be an arbitrary string.

Website.description: URL of the web page of the mod.

DefaultPreferredItems.description: Default preferred items to list as the main item of a group managed by the mod creator.

RequiredFeatures.description: A list of required features by name.

DefaultData.description: The default redirections, file swaps and meta edits applied by this mod when enabled.

Groups.description: All option groups this mod contains.
